info.name: Airtime Lending Platform - Enterprise Admin APIs FINAL V4
info.description: Final polished frontend handoff Postman collection with grouped admin modules, auth placeholders, sample payloads, multipart upload definitions, and engineering descriptions.

request.description:
Executive KPI cards.

Sample Success Response:
{
  "totalDisbursed":1250000,
  "totalRecovered":910000,
  "outstandingPortfolio":340000,
  "totalRevenue":145000
}
